Meta.Name: Meta Skill Auditor
Meta.Description: Audits folders, skills, and harness components, classifies migration verdicts, and emits patch roadmaps for V4 work.

Input.Name: target_scope
Input.Description: Folder, file, or harness component to audit.

Input.Name: pipeline_refs
Input.Description: Current synthesis doctrine and patch packs.

Output.Name: audit_scorecard
Output.Description: Dimension scores, verdict, and key findings.

Output.Name: decomposition_map
Output.Description: Required atom or module split for large assets.

Rules.Rule: Discovery metadata is a first-class gate.
Large assets without decomposition guidance cannot receive a keep verdict.
Treat relational operations as contractual requirements, not optional prose.

Step.Name: Inventory
Step.Action: List current assets and identify role overlap.

Step.Name: Compare
Step.Action: Measure each target against the current benchmark and pipeline doctrine.

Step.Name: Classify
Step.Action: Assign keep, patch, decompose, rebuild, or archive.

Step.Name: Emit Roadmap
Step.Action: Define patch order, ownership, and relational impact.

Implementation.QuickReference: AUDITOR LOOP 1. Inventory the folder. 2. Identify the strongest benchmark. 3. Detect contradictions and overlap. 4. Issue verdicts. 5. Route architecture work to architect and implementation work to builder.

SelfCheck.Check: Every audited asset receives a verdict.
Every patch or rebuild verdict identifies an owner and next artifact.
Contradictions between pipeline docs and executable skills are explicitly logged.

MMAGate.Trigger: Before a folder enters V4 refactor.
MMAGate.Threshold: Audit packet complete with scorecard, roadmap, and relational impact note.

Mode.Recovery: Escalate to meta_skill_architect for target role definition.
Promote verdict from patch to rebuild.
Confirm or redefine the current family benchmark before continuing.

PatchLog.Entry: Created canonical audit front door for folder-by-folder V4 migration.
